creator: mike@jellydonut.org
text: Adding a me-too here, just upgraded my Celeron J1900 (ASrock Q1900-ITX) from FreeBSD 10.4 to 11.2 via freebsd-update and ran into this exact issue. Setting kern.vty=sc at the loader prompt allows the machine to complete the boot sequence and adding it to /boot/loader.conf allows a reboot to work without issue.
